title: Ubiquiti case for UAP nanoHD, U6 Lite a U6+, Marble Design, 3-Pack
description: nHD-cover-Marble-3 is a set of 3 covers for UAP-nanoHD, U6 Lite, U6+ and *UAP-AC-LITE with Marble design. For demanding customers is available up to 6 optional skins allow the UniFi AP to blend into its surroundings Cover for UAP-AC-LITE is not officially supported by manufacturer. After testing and comparing UAP-AC-LITE and UAP-nanoHD, LITE version is 1mm lower and fits into the cover without any problem (3) cover with motive
